"use client"

import * as React from "react"
import { type DialogProps } from "@radix-ui/react-dialog"
import { Command as CommandPrimitive } from "cmdk"
import { Search } from "lucide-react"
import { Dialog, DialogContent } from "@/registry/new-york/ui/dialog"
import { tw } from "~/tw";

const Command = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof CommandPrimitive>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof CommandPrimitive>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <CommandPrimitive
    ref={ref}
    className={tw.def([className], {
        display: "flex",
        height: "h-full",
        width: "w-full",
        flexDirection: "flex-col",
        overflow: "overflow-hidden",
        borderRadius: "rounded-md",
        backgroundColor: "bg-popover",
        color: "text-popover-foreground",
    })}
    {...props}
  />
))
Command.displayName = CommandPrimitive.displayName

const CommandDialog = ({ children, ...props }: DialogProps) => {
  return (
    <Dialog {...props}>
      <DialogContent className={tw.style({
              overflow: "overflow-hidden",
              padding: "p-0",
          }).class()}>
        <Command className={tw.style({
                  "[&_[cmdk-group-heading]]": {
                      padding: "[&_[cmdk-group-heading]]:px-2",
                      fontWeight: "[&_[cmdk-group-heading]]:font-medium",
                      color: "[&_[cmdk-group-heading]]:text-muted-foreground",
                  },
                  "[&_[cmdk-group]:not([hidden])_~[cmdk-group]]": {
                      padding: "[&_[cmdk-group]:not([hidden])_~[cmdk-group]]:pt-0",
                  },
                  "[&_[cmdk-group]]": {
                      padding: "[&_[cmdk-group]]:px-2",
                  },
                  "[&_[cmdk-input-wrapper]_svg]": {
                      height: "[&_[cmdk-input-wrapper]_svg]:h-5",
                      width: "[&_[cmdk-input-wrapper]_svg]:w-5",
                  },
                  "[&_[cmdk-input]]": {
                      height: "[&_[cmdk-input]]:h-12",
                  },
                  "[&_[cmdk-item]]": {
                      padding: ["[&_[cmdk-item]]:px-2", "[&_[cmdk-item]]:py-3"],
                  },
                  "[&_[cmdk-item]_svg]": {
                      height: "[&_[cmdk-item]_svg]:h-5",
                      width: "[&_[cmdk-item]_svg]:w-5",
                  },
              }).class()}>
          {children}
        </Command>
      </DialogContent>
    </Dialog>
  )
}

const CommandInput = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof CommandPrimitive.Input>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof CommandPrimitive.Input>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <div className={tw.style({
        display: "flex",
        alignItems: "items-center",
        borderWidth: "border-b",
        padding: "px-3",
    }).class()} cmdk-input-wrapper="">
    <Search className={tw.style({
            margin: "mr-2",
            height: "h-4",
            width: "w-4",
            flexShrink: "shrink-0",
            opacity: "opacity-50",
        }).class()} />
    <CommandPrimitive.Input
      ref={ref}
      className={tw.def([className], {
          display: "flex",
          height: "h-10",
          width: "w-full",
          borderRadius: "rounded-md",
          backgroundColor: "bg-transparent",
          padding: "py-3",
          fontSize: "text-sm",
          outlineStyle: "outline-none",
          placeholder: {
              color: "placeholder:text-muted-foreground",
          },
          disabled: {
              cursor: "disabled:cursor-not-allowed",
              opacity: "disabled:opacity-50",
          },
      })}
      {...props}
    />
  </div>
))

CommandInput.displayName = CommandPrimitive.Input.displayName

const CommandList = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof CommandPrimitive.List>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof CommandPrimitive.List>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <CommandPrimitive.List
    ref={ref}
    className={tw.def([className], {
        maxHeight: "max-h-[300px]",
        overflow: ["overflow-y-auto", "overflow-x-hidden"],
    })}
    {...props}
  />
))

CommandList.displayName = CommandPrimitive.List.displayName

const CommandEmpty = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof CommandPrimitive.Empty>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof CommandPrimitive.Empty>
>((props, ref) => (
  <CommandPrimitive.Empty
    ref={ref}
    className={tw.style({
            padding: "py-6",
            textAlign: "text-center",
            fontSize: "text-sm",
        }).class()}
    {...props}
  />
))

CommandEmpty.displayName = CommandPrimitive.Empty.displayName

const CommandGroup = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof CommandPrimitive.Group>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof CommandPrimitive.Group>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <CommandPrimitive.Group
    ref={ref}
    className={tw.def([className], {
        overflow: "overflow-hidden",
        padding: "p-1",
        color: "text-foreground",
        "[&_[cmdk-group-heading]]": {
            padding: ["[&_[cmdk-group-heading]]:px-2", "[&_[cmdk-group-heading]]:py-1.5"],
            fontSize: "[&_[cmdk-group-heading]]:text-xs",
            fontWeight: "[&_[cmdk-group-heading]]:font-medium",
            color: "[&_[cmdk-group-heading]]:text-muted-foreground",
        },
    })}
    {...props}
  />
))

CommandGroup.displayName = CommandPrimitive.Group.displayName

const CommandSeparator = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof CommandPrimitive.Separator>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof CommandPrimitive.Separator>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <CommandPrimitive.Separator
    ref={ref}
    className={tw.def([className], {
        margin: "-mx-1",
        height: "h-px",
        backgroundColor: "bg-border",
    })}
    {...props}
  />
))
CommandSeparator.displayName = CommandPrimitive.Separator.displayName

const CommandItem = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof CommandPrimitive.Item>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof CommandPrimitive.Item>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <CommandPrimitive.Item
    ref={ref}
    className={tw.def([className], {
        position: "relative",
        display: "flex",
        cursor: "cursor-default",
        gap: "gap-2",
        userSelect: "select-none",
        alignItems: "items-center",
        borderRadius: "rounded-sm",
        padding: ["px-2", "py-1.5"],
        fontSize: "text-sm",
        outlineStyle: "outline-none",
        "data-[disabled=true]": {
            pointerEvents: "data-[disabled=true]:pointer-events-none",
            opacity: "data-[disabled=true]:opacity-50",
        },
        "data-[selected=true]": {
            backgroundColor: "data-[selected=true]:bg-accent",
            color: "data-[selected=true]:text-accent-foreground",
        },
        "[&_svg]": {
            pointerEvents: "[&_svg]:pointer-events-none",
            width: "[&_svg]:size-4",
            flexShrink: "[&_svg]:shrink-0",
        },
    })}
    {...props}
  />
))

CommandItem.displayName = CommandPrimitive.Item.displayName

const CommandShortcut = ({
  className,
  ...props
}: React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLSpanElement>) => {
  return (
    <span
      className={tw.def([className], {
              margin: "ml-auto",
              fontSize: "text-xs",
              letterSpacing: "tracking-widest",
              color: "text-muted-foreground",
          })}
      {...props}
    />
  )
}
CommandShortcut.displayName = "CommandShortcut"

export {
  Command,
  CommandDialog,
  CommandInput,
  CommandList,
  CommandEmpty,
  CommandGroup,
  CommandItem,
  CommandShortcut,
  CommandSeparator,
}
